page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.16xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the custom 64-core Alibaba Yitian YiTian710 ARM64 processor. Operating at 2.75 GHz, this instance features a dedicated CPU allocation with one thread per core and no hyperthreading. It is equipped with 256 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The processor includes 64 KB of L1d cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 64 MB of L3 cache, alongside hardware-accelerated AES cryptography. Local storage is not bundled, and network performance is anchored by a 32 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

Benchmark data reveals strong multi-core capabilities and memory efficiency. The instance achieves a strong multi-core CPU performance score of 114,913.22 in stress-ng and a top-tier multi-threaded bzip3 decompression rate of 461.74 GB/sec. Memory subsystem performance is highlighted by a top-tier PassMark memory score and a strong cached read-only memory bandwidth of 6,463.67 GB/sec, though uncached large-block read and write speeds remain in the average tier. Database operations and Redis SET performance are strong, with Redis handling 93.0 million operations per second. Single-core performance and LLM inference speeds for small and medium models fall within average ranges.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ARM64 architecture provides high resource density and strong multi-threaded throughput per unit of compute resource compared to traditional x86 architectures. However, the lack of local NVMe storage and the absence of advanced x86 instruction sets like AVX or AMX represent notable tradeoffs for workloads requiring local scratch space or specialized vector acceleration. The instance is highly suited for multi-threaded applications, database operations, web serving, and general-purpose enterprise workloads that benefit from dedicated physical cores and high memory bandwidth.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by a 64-core Alibaba Yitian YiTian710 ARM64 processor running at 2.75 GHz. It features a dedicated CPU allocation with one thread per core, 256 GB of RAM, and a 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, with no local storage. Performance benchmarks indicate strong multi-core capabilities, highlighted by a top-tier multi-threaded bzip3 decompression rate and a strong stress-ng multi-core score. The memory subsystem delivers top-tier PassMark memory performance and strong cached read bandwidth. While single-core speeds and uncached memory bandwidth are average, the instance excels in multi-threaded tasks and database operations, handling 93.0 million Redis SET operations per second. This profile makes it highly efficient for multi-threaded enterprise applications, database workloads, and web serving, offering a balanced resource-to-compute ratio without the overhead of hyperthreading.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.16xlarge is an ARM64 general-purpose instance with 64 dedicated YiTian710 cores, 256 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps bandwidth, delivering strong multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.16xlarge is a 64-core ARM64 general-purpose instance with 256 GB RAM, offering strong multi-core and memory performance.
tagline: A dedicated 64-core ARM64 instance delivering strong multi-threaded performance and high memory bandwidth for balanced enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a 64-core Alibaba Yitian YiTian710 ARM64 processor at 2.75 GHz
Equipped with 256 GB of RAM and 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Delivers strong multi-core performance and top-tier multi-threaded decompression
Features dedicated physical cores with no hyperthreading for predictable execution
Optimized for database operations, multi-threaded applications, and web serving
